title: salix × macrior
intro: Salix × macior, also known as Salix × macior, is a hybrid plant of the willow family (Salicaceae) and is a cross between the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and another species of willow. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and has been used to treat pain, reduce inflammation, and lower fevers. The health benefits of Salix × macior include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic, making it useful for wound healing, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Salix × macior can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues.
